languages.text: Батальон Безымянных Последних, как стали известны стражи гробницы, считались героями, а их подвиг передавался в песнях из поколения в поколение. Выковав крепкую связь с Ордо Ксенос, они продолжили свой вечный дозор. Поддержка агентов Золотого Трона помогла сокращать потери и отбивать натиск свежевателей, когда те вновь вырывались наружу, а некоторые отслужившие в Безымянных вербовались для службы в Инквизиции.

The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. After forging a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos, they continued their eternal vigil. The support of the agents of the Golden Throne helped minimise losses and repel each onslaught of the Flayed Ones whenever they broke free, and some who served in the Nameless Last were later recruited to the ranks of the Inquisition.
languages.original_text: Батальон Безымянных Последних, как стали известны стражи гробницы, считались героями, а их подвиг передавался в песнях из поколения в поколение. Выковав крепкую связь с Ордо Ксенос, они продолжили свой вечный дозор. Поддержка агентов Золотого Трона помогла сокращать потери и отбивать натиск свежевателей, когда те вновь вырывались наружу, а некоторые отслужившие в Безымянных вербовались для службы в Инквизиции.

After forging a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos, they continued their eternal vigil. languages.text: 墓守たちは「無名にして最後の大隊」として知られるようになり、英雄とみなされ、その功績は世代から世代へと歌い継がれて不朽のものとなった。オルド・ゼノスと強固な同盟を結んだ後、彼らは永遠の警備を続けた。黄金の玉座の代理人たちの支援は損害を最小限に抑え、フレイド・ワンが脱するたびにその猛攻を撃退する助けとなり、「無名にして最後の大隊」に仕えた者の中には、後に異端審問会の列に迎えられた者もいた。
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. After forging a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos, they continued their eternal vigil. The support of the agents of the Golden Throne helped minimise losses and repel each onslaught of the Flayed Ones whenever they broke free, and some who served in the Nameless Last were later recruited to the ranks of the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: 無名最後の連隊は、墓守兵として知られるようになったが、記録から消え去った。しかし、彼らは無言の英雄として残った。彼らはオルド・ゼノスと強い同盟を結び、ロード・キャプテンはインキジションとの新たな協力の道を開いた。王座の代理人の支援により、損害を最小限に抑え、フレイアーズの襲撃を撃退することができた。そして、無名最後の連隊で勤務した者の中には、インキジションに招かれた者もいた。
墓守たちは「無名にして最後の大隊」として知られるようになり、英雄とみなされ、その功績は世代から世代へと歌い継がれて不朽のものとなった。オルド・ゼノスと強固な同盟を結んだ後、彼らは永遠の警備を続けた。黄金の玉座の代理人たちの支援は損害を最小限に抑え、フレイド・ワンが脱するたびにその猛攻を撃退する助けとなり、「無名にして最後の大隊」に仕えた者の中には、後に異端審問会の列に迎えられた者もいた。

languages.text: 无名终旅营，也就是后来人们所熟知的墓穴守卫部队。他们被视为英雄，事迹被编成歌谣世代传唱。在与异形审判庭结下牢固联盟后，他们继续执行永恒的守望职责。黄金王座特工的支援将损失降到了最低，每当剥皮者挣脱束缚发起攻击，他们都将其成功击退。后来，一些曾在无名终旅营中服役的人被招募进了审判庭。
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. After forging a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos, they continued their eternal vigil. The support of the agents of the Golden Throne helped minimise losses and repel each onslaught of the Flayed Ones whenever they broke free, and some who served in the Nameless Last were later recruited to the ranks of the Inquisition.

languages.text: Le bataillon des derniers Sans-nom, comme on nomma les gardes du tombeau, devint un symbole d’héroïsme et ses exploits furent immortalisés dans des chansons transmises de génération en génération. Ayant forgé une alliance solide avec l'Ordo Xenos, il poursuivit sa veille éternelle. Le soutien des agents du Trône d'or permit de minimiser les pertes et de repousser les assauts des Dépeceurs chaque fois que ces derniers parvenaient à se libérer. Par la suite, certains membres du bataillon rejoignirent les rangs de l'Inquisition.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. After forging a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos, they continued their eternal vigil. The support of the agents of the Golden Throne helped minimise losses and repel each onslaught of the Flayed Ones whenever they broke free, and some who served in the Nameless Last were later recruited to the ranks of the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: Le bataillon des derniers Sans-nom, comme on nomma les gardes du tombeau, devint un symbole d’héroïsme et ses exploits furent immortalisés dans des chansons transmises de génération en génération. Ayant forgé une alliance solide avec l'Ordo Xenos, il poursuivit sa veille éternelle. Le soutien des agents du Trône d'or permit de minimiser les pertes et de repousser les assauts des Dépeceurs chaque fois que ces derniers parvenaient à se libérer. Par la suite, certains membres du bataillon rejoignirent les rangs de l'Inquisition.

Même si le bataillon des derniers Sans-nom, comme on nomma les gardes du tombeau, disparut de toutes les archives, sa réputation de troupe héroïque perdura. Il forgea une puissante alliance avec l'Ordo Xenos et facilita la collaboration {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine} avec l'Inquisition, dont le soutien permit de minimiser les pertes et de repousser l'assaut des Dépeceurs. Certains des membres du bataillon furent ensuite recrutés par l'Inquisition.

languages.text: El Batallón de los Últimos Sin Nombre, como se conoció a los guardias de la tumba, fueron recordados como héroes y sus hazañas se inmortalizaron en canciones transmitidas de generación en generación. Tras forjar una sólida alianza con el Ordo Xenos, continuaron con su eterna vigilia. El apoyo de los agentes del Trono Dorado contribuyó a minimizar sus pérdidas y rechazar el asalto de los desolladores cada vez que se liberaban; algunos de los Últimos Sin Nombre acabaron siendo reclutados por la Inquisición.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. After forging a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos, they continued their eternal vigil. The support of the agents of the Golden Throne helped minimise losses and repel each onslaught of the Flayed Ones whenever they broke free, and some who served in the Nameless Last were later recruited to the ranks of the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: El Batallón de los Últimos Sin Nombre, como se conoció a los guardias de la tumba, fueron recordados como héroes y sus hazañas se inmortalizaron en canciones transmitidas de generación en generación. Tras forjar una sólida alianza con el Ordo Xenos, continuaron con su eterna vigilia. El apoyo de los agentes del Trono Dorado contribuyó a minimizar sus pérdidas y rechazar el asalto de los desolladores cada vez que se liberaban; algunos de los Últimos Sin Nombre acabaron siendo reclutados por la Inquisición.

languages.text: Mezarı koruyan askerlerin bilindiği adıyla İsimsiz Sona Kalan Taburu kahraman kabul edildi ve eylemleri nesilden nesle aktarılan şarkılarda ölümsüzleştirildi. Zeno Nizamı ile güçlü bir ittifak kurduktan sonra sonsuz nöbetlerine devam ettiler. Altın Taht ajanlarının desteği, kayıpları en aza indirmeye ve Yüzülmüşler her kurtulduğunda saldırılarını püskürtmeye yardımcı oldu. Mezarı koruyan askerlerin bilindiği adıyla İsimsiz Sona Kalan Taburu'nda hizmet edenlerin bazıları sonraları Engizisyon saflarına alındı.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. After forging a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos, they continued their eternal vigil. The support of the agents of the Golden Throne helped minimise losses and repel each onslaught of the Flayed Ones whenever they broke free, and some who served in the Nameless Last were later recruited to the ranks of the Inquisition.

Zeno Nizamı ile güçlü bir ittifak kurduktan sonra sonsuz nöbetlerine devam ettiler. Altın Taht ajanlarının desteği, kayıpları en aza indirmeye ve Yüzülmüşler her kurtulduğunda saldırılarını püskürtmeye yardımcı oldu. Mezarı koruyan askerlerin bilindiği adıyla İsimsiz Sona Kalan Taburu'nda hizmet edenlerin bazıları sonraları Engizisyon saflarına alındı.

languages.text: Die Namenlosen Letzten, wie die Wächter des Grabes genannt wurden, wurden als Helden verehrt und in über Generationen hinweg überlieferten Liedern besungen. Nachdem sie eine starke Allianz mit dem Ordo Xenos eingegangen waren, setzten sie ihre ewige Wacht fort. Durch die Unterstützung der Agenten des Goldenen Throns konnten die Verluste minimiert und die Angriffe der Albträume zurückgeschlagen werden, wenn sich diese befreiten. Überdies wurden einige Krieger der Namenlosen Letzten später in die Reihen der Inquisition aufgenommen.
